THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHERMAN, RON L. SUED AS SHERMAN, RON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 780 HAYES STREET #105, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT & DAMAGES. DEFT WAIVES RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. STIP/JUDGMNT RESOLVES ALL ISSUES BETWEEN PARTIES ARISING FROM TENANCY.
